---
name: Tester feedback
about: Share your experience as a tester — what was confusing, what you liked
title: "[FEEDBACK] "
labels: feedback
---

Thanks for testing For3s OS! This is the feedback we can't see from the inside.

## What did you try
Which features/commands did you test?

## What was confusing or unexpected
Anything unclear, surprising, or harder than it should be.

## What worked well
What did you like?

## What's missing
What did you expect to find that wasn't there?

## Environment
- OS / distro:
- How far did you get? (install / first message / used features / …)
